output:
<function=python_exec>json_data = file_read("employees.json")
# Assuming the JSON file contains the following data:
# [{"name": "John", "salary": 50000}, {"name": "Alice", "salary": 60000}, {"name": "Bob", "salary": 70000}, {"name": "Charlie", "salary": 80000}, {"name": "David", "salary": 90000}]
salaries = [employee['salary'] for employee in json_data]
avg_salary = sum(salaries) / len(salaries)
highest_paid = max(json_data, key=lambda x: x['salary'])
print(f'Average salary: ${avg_salary:.0f}, Highest paid: {highest_paid["name"]} (${highest_paid["salary"]:.0f})')</function>
